aboutRight.aboutText: We are specialists in the production and commercialization of the highest quality Peruvian copal. Our natural resins come from the Amazon rainforests of Peru, used since ancient times by indigenous communities for purification rituals and spiritual healing.

archivement.text: We are Copal Peru, specialists in Amazonian natural resins. We are passionately dedicated to preserving ancestral traditions and offering the highest quality products.
With over 15 years of experience in the natural products market, we have positioned ourselves as leaders in the export of Peruvian copal.

aboutRight.note: "Copal is the soul of our ancestors, a sacred connection between earth and spirit that purifies and heals."

usesAndBenefitsData.title: Uses & Benefits of Amazonian Black Copal
usesAndBenefitsData.intro: Amazonian black copal resin—also known as copal negro—is a sacred incense traditionally used for energy cleansing, protection, and spiritual connection. Its earthy, balsamic aroma creates a dense, grounding smoke that's ideal for rituals, meditation, and aromatic ambiance at home, studios, and sacred spaces.

benefits.title: Cleansing & Protection
benefits.heading: Purifying atmosphere and energy reset
benefits.text: Create a purifying atmosphere and reset the energy of rooms, altars, and objects. Black copal smoke is traditionally used to clear stagnant energy and support protective intentions during ceremony and daily rituals.

benefits.title: Meditation & Focus
benefits.heading: Deepen breath and center the mind
benefits.imgAlt: Copal Supplier - Meditation & Focus with Amazonian Black Copal Resin
benefits.imgTitle: Copal Supplier - Natural Black Copal for Meditation
benefits.text: The slow, resinous burn helps you deepen breath, center the mind, and stay present. Many practitioners find increased clarity, grounded focus, and a calmer internal state for meditation and journaling.

benefits.title: Aromatherapy & Atmosphere
benefits.heading: Warm, resinous profile for wellness spaces
benefits.text: Its warm, resinous profile adds depth and character to wellness spaces. Burn alone or pair it with complementary botanicals to cultivate an intimate, sacred ambiance for gatherings and self-care.

howToBurn.title: How to Burn Black Copal (Step-by-Step)
steps: Light a charcoal disc until it glows and turns gray.
Place the disc in a heat-safe resin burner on sand or ash.
Add a small piece of black copal on top—let it melt and gently smolder.
Ventilate the room; add resin gradually for steady smoke.
howToBurn.safetyNote: Burn on heat-resistant surfaces, keep away from children/pets, and ensure proper ventilation.

wholesaleButton.ariaLabel: Request wholesale quote for Black Copal

whoWeAreData.title: Who We Are — Munay Ki Perú SAC
whoWeAreData.intro: Founded in 2014 in Lima, Munay Ki Perú SAC is a family business born from a deep journey along the Andean-Amazonian spiritual path. Our mission is to share the richness of Peru's sacred resources—such as black copal resin—while ensuring authenticity, premium quality, and sustainability in everything we offer.

commitmentPoints.text: Direct partnership with Achuar communities in Iquitos, Peru.
Sustainable harvesting under certified forest management plans.
Zero deforestation — resins are collected without harming trees.
Promotion of reforestation initiatives and responsible resource use.
100% legal sourcing with SERFOR export permits.

whoWeAreData.whyChooseIntro: We are more than a supplier—we are guardians of Amazonian traditions. By choosing us, you support:
whyChoosePoints: A family-run company with more than a decade of expertise.
Fair trade practices that empower local communities.
Ethical sourcing that respects both people and planet.
whoWeAreData.closingText: From Peru to the world, we are proud to be the most trusted black copal supplier for distributors, wellness centers, and spiritual communities in the USA, Europe, and Asia.

cta.ariaLabel: Get in touch with Munay Ki Peru SAC, black copal supplier

image.alt: Munay Ki Peru SAC team working with Achuar communities to harvest black copal resin sustainably in Peru.

originSustainabilityData.title: Origin & Sustainability of Amazonian Black Copal
originSustainabilityData.intro: Our Amazonian black copal resin comes directly from the Peruvian rainforest, where the Achuar communities of Iquitos harvest it with deep respect for nature. For generations, these communities have viewed copal as a sacred gift, using traditional methods that protect the forest while preserving the resin's potency.
harvestPoints: Only resin naturally produced by living trees is collected.
No deforestation — harvesting respects the tree's regeneration cycle.
All production complies with SERFOR forest management plans and legal permits.
Local collectors receive fair trade compensation, supporting livelihoods and community development.
originSustainabilityData.globalTitle: From the Amazon to the World
originSustainabilityData.globalText: Today, Amazonian black copal transcends borders, carrying the purifying energy of the rainforest to homes and spiritual centers worldwide. Our resin is already trusted in Germany, Japan, South Korea, Taiwan, and the UAE, where its aroma and authenticity inspire spiritual practices and holistic wellness.

timeline.title: Amazon Rainforest
timeline.description: Copal resin forms naturally inside native trees.

timeline.title: Community Harvest
timeline.description: Achuar collectors sustainably gather resin with traditional methods.

timeline.title: Global Supply
timeline.description: From Peru to the world — wholesale and retail distribution.

cta.ariaLabel: Read more about our ethical and sustainable harvesting of black copal

productsData.title: Our Black Copal Products
productsData.intro: We offer a wide range of Amazonian black copal products, each carefully sourced, processed, and packaged to meet the highest quality standards. Whether you're a retailer, distributor, or wellness center, our catalog adapts to your needs—from raw resin to value-added formats.

products.title: COPAL INCENSE WITH PALO SANTO
products.description: Premium blend of Amazonian black copal resin with authentic Palo Santo wood. This sacred combination creates a powerful aromatic experience perfect for meditation, energy cleansing, and spiritual ceremonies.
features: 100% natural black copal and Palo Santo blend
Sustainably sourced from the Peruvian Amazon
Perfect for meditation and spiritual practices
Long-lasting aromatic experience
products.imageAlt: Copal incense with Palo Santo blend for spiritual ceremonies

products.title: COPAL RESIN
products.description: Pure Amazonian black copal resin in its natural form. Harvested sustainably from the Peruvian rainforest, this premium resin is perfect for traditional incense burning and energy purification rituals.
features: 100% pure Amazonian black copal resin
SERFOR certified with legal export permits
Traditional harvesting methods
Ideal for spiritual practices and aromatherapy
products.imageAlt: Pure black copal resin from the Peruvian Amazon

products.title: BLACK COPAL, PALO SANTO AND MIRA RESINS
products.description: Exclusive blend of three sacred resins: black copal, Palo Santo, and Myrrh. This powerful combination offers a unique aromatic profile for deep meditation, spiritual ceremonies, and energy cleansing practices.
features: Triple blend of sacred resins
Black copal, Palo Santo, and Myrrh combination
Perfect for advanced spiritual practices
Unique aromatic profile for deep meditation
products.imageAlt: Blend of black copal, Palo Santo and Myrrh resins

products.title: Essential Oil & Extracts
products.description: Steam-distilled black copal essential oil, concentrated for use in aromatherapy, diffusers, and holistic wellness products. Wholesale options available for cosmetic and wellness industries.
features: Steam-distilled for maximum purity and potency
Concentrated formula for aromatherapy use
Suitable for diffusers and wellness products
Bulk options for cosmetic industry applications
products.imageAlt: Dropper bottle with black copal essential oil for aromatherapy

products.title: Wholesale & Bulk Supply
products.description: As the leading black copal supplier from Peru, we provide bulk options for distributors and international buyers. From kilos to container loads, fully certified with SERFOR permits.
features: Bulk quantities from 10kg to container loads
Competitive wholesale pricing for distributors
Full SERFOR certification and export documentation
International shipping to USA, Europe, and Asia
products.imageAlt: Large quantities of black copal resin prepared for wholesale distribution

bottomCta.text: Need a custom solution or have questions about our products? Our team is ready to help you find the perfect black copal option for your business.
bottomCta.ariaLabel: Contact Munay Ki Peru SAC sales team for custom black copal solutions

copalDifferencesData.title: Understanding the Different Types of Copal

peruVsMexico.title: Copal from Peru vs. Copal from Mexico
peruVsMexico.intro: Both Peru and Mexico are renowned for their copal resins, but they differ in botanical species, aroma profiles, and cultural uses. Here's how they compare:

attributes.name: Origin
attributes.leftValue: Harvested in the Peruvian Amazon (Achuar communities, Iquitos)
attributes.rightValue: Harvested mainly in Oaxaca and central Mexico

attributes.name: Uses
attributes.rightValue: Traditional rituals, Dia de los Muertos offerings

attributes.name: Sustainability
attributes.leftValue: Certified, harvested under SERFOR forest plans

attributes.name: Market
attributes.leftValue: Popular in wellness, aromatherapy, global wholesale
attributes.rightValue: Strong in cultural ceremonies and artisanal incense

blackVsWhite.title: Black Copal vs White Copal
blackVsWhite.intro: Both black copal (copal negro) and white copal (copal blanco) are sacred resins, each with distinct aromas, colors, and ritual uses.

attributes.name: Appearance
attributes.leftValue: Dark brown to black, dense resin
attributes.rightValue: Pale, golden or white, lighter resin

copalDifferencesData.closingText: At Munay Ki Perú SAC, we specialize in Amazonian Black Copal harvested sustainably in Peru, ensuring authentic quality for both spiritual practice and wholesale distribution.

cta.ariaLabel: Shop our premium black copal products
Request wholesale pricing for black copal
